svg.title: LLM guardrails comparison: AWS, Azure, Google Cloud and open-source self-hosted
svg.desc: Verified comparison of LLM guardrail controls across AWS, Azure, GCP, and open-source software, by guardrail box and layer.
svg.text: LLM guardrails — cloud vs open-source (web-verified, May 2026)
Notes flag applicability — direct equivalent vs closest match vs not really equivalent.
Verified via web search · May 2026 · Cloud LLM-guardrail features change quickly; treat as a current-quarter snapshot, not a permanent reference.
